_comment: Digital Insurgency — standalone SPZ-network podcast. Consumed by the shared repo-root publishing/ pipeline (gen_feed.py / gen_site.py / deploy.sh). Paths are relative to the REPO ROOT. To publish, copy this to publishing/config.json (see podcast/README.md). NO AUDIO PRODUCED YET — produced_dir is intentionally empty; do not deploy until scripts are recorded.

show.title: Digital Insurgency
show.subtitle: Smuggle the future past the corporate immune system — a field course narrated by Space Pirate Zero
show.author: Space Pirate Zero
show.public_url_note: Canonical domain for the Digital Insurgency experience (site + podcast landing). Register + point DNS at the Cloud Run service before promoting the show.
show.description: The corporation has an immune system. It kills anything new on contact — with forms, committees, sunk cost, and a fear reflex older than the org chart. Digital Insurgency is the field manual for getting the future past it anyway. Fourteen episodes of applied physics — extinction rates, vendor gravity, the entropy tax, the Dorian Gray Index — wrapped in a cyberpunk broadcast: ZERO, a burned-out platform engineer who walked out of a company optimizing loneliness, learns to smuggle authenticity into the belly of the machine. Not by burning it down. Four percent at a time. Transmitted to you by Space Pirate Zero, from Spaceship Alpha 9. Signal finds signal.

schedule.note: Field course: one module a week keeps the assignments doable. Switch mode to 'all_at_launch' for a binge drop.

episodes.title: The Curator's Edge & the Psychology of the Blockade
Calculus for Cowards & The Qualification Protocol
Field Dispatches: Three Runs in the Wild
Victory Without Fire & The Insurgent's Oath
